arts.ttl: 'Really bad decision' - MOTD pundits on Everton penalty
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Danny Murphy and Alan Shearer believe Everton should not have been awarded a penalty in their Premier League draw against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti handed huge new suspension blow before Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Antonio Rudiger, Kylian Mbappe, Vinicius Jr and Dani Ceballos were all at risk of being banned for the clash at Emirates Stadium after UEFA opened an investigation into their celebrations following the dramatic last-16 triumph over Atletico Madrid on penalties. arts.ttl: How Arsenal can line up without Gabriel against Real Madrid
arts.sum: How Arsenal can line up against Real Madrid without Gabriel following the defender's season-ending injury.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent Liam Delap transfer message as new Alexander Isak alternative mooted
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour tells Sports Mole why Liam Delap would be an ideal signing for the Gunners after his 11th goal of the Premier League season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Lewis-Skelly PROBLEM could be a BLESSING in disguise
arts.sum: Lewis-Skelly has impressed with his overall performances at left-back, so much so that he is already a full senior England international, but there is one glaring problem: the teenager has repeatedly been on the wrong end of game-changing refereeing decisions. It increasingly looks as though Arsenal may have a Myles Lewis-Skelly problem.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop more points in title race with draw at Everton
arts.sum: Ndiaye stroked home from 12 yards to score his seventh Premier League goal of the season, the most for Everton this season, after Myles Lewis-Skelly had fouled Jack Harrison early in the second half. Ahead of the first leg of Arsenal's UEFA Champions League quarter-final tie against Real Madrid on Tuesday, Martin Odegaard, Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Martinelli all started on the bench and were unable to make an impact after coming on.

arts.ttl: Photo: Former Arsenal teammates reunited before Barcelona vs Real Betis
arts.sum: Two former Arsenal teammates were spotted reconvening in the buildup to Saturday’s La Liga meeting between Barcelona and Real Betis. The pair in question? Wojciech Szczesny and Hector Bellerin. Barcelona…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta offers Arsenal update after latest injury scare vs Everton
arts.sum: An injury-hit Arsenal side were held to a 1-1 draw with Everton at Goodison Park on Saturday with the Gunners being given a fresh concern during the game on Merseyside

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal among Premier League giants eyeing 'spectacular' teenage talent likened to Alexander Hleb
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal, Liverpool, Manchester City and Manchester United are among the clubs keeping tabs on Juventus talent Kenan Yildiz. Arsenal,...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hits out at referee after Arsenal slip up against Everton
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta was left furious by the decision to award Everton a penalty that proved decisive during Saturday's 1-1 draw at Goodison Park.
